note: Per v0.2 Section 8.5 and Decision 12: only KEY NAMES recorded. Values are never read into the model context.
integration_keys_expected_note: Integrations are present in code (apps/novizna_crm/novizna_crm/api/connectors/) but no corresponding keys appear in site_config.json — suggests credentials are stored in DocType settings rows (e.g., Invoice Ninja Settings, Zoho Settings) rather than site config. Phase 2 will inspect Settings DocTypes for per-tenant credential layout.

security_flag.finding: CSRF protection disabled site-wide. Cross-referenced in anti-pattern-findings.json AP-005.
